produced_by: dev (test-writer subagent did not complete; dev filled in per dispatch directive)

test_files.implementation_summary: Parses EVENT_DELTAS dict literal from scripts/score-update.sh, asserts Path A expected values for 5 positive events, validates 2 cycle-scenario sums (qa_first_pass+close_success_qa_pass+user_rating_5 + qa_second_pass+close_success_qa_fail_fixed+user_rating_5) <= +5 (PRIMARY), validates 5 per-event positive cross-agent sums <= +5 (GUARD), validates all 20 negative-valued entries unchanged against frozen enumeration, greps commands/dev.md + commands/close.md for stale strings (dev +6, dev +3, dev +5 ba +3 qa +3, dev +5 ba +3 qa +2), conditionally validates dev-report score_rebalance_path_chosen='A' if dev-report file exists.

Greps agents/{ba,dev,qa}.md for 'Score-injection echo contract' section + all 4 required field names + fail-safe null clause. Asserts tests/score-inject-contract/test-inject-branches.sh + runtime-verify.sh exist and are executable. Runs test-inject-branches.sh as subprocess and asserts exit 0 (which internally validates INJECTION_PROOF presence + 4 fields + INDEPENDENTLY-recomputed sha256[:8] equality in all 3 stdout branches: populated, missing, malformed).

Locates Session Summary region in commands/close.md (between 'Session Summary' label and 'User rating prompt' marker). Asserts presence of required phrases (chronological, timeline, 'User need:', 'Design response:', user-requirement-, '<= 15 lines', FORBIDDEN/forbidden, orchestrator-improvisational/improvisational) AND absence of old 5-bucket phrases (What was accomplished / What was NOT accomplished / User needs satisfied / Bugs encountered / Improvement opportunities) within the template region.

Split into 4 pytest functions: (1) test_AC_04_static — assertions on script ordering (existence-check < unlink < json.dump(sentinel)), commit.md Step 1 BULK precondition documented, pretool-bash-safety.sh + pretool-write-guard.sh contain bulk-commit-auth-flag-write rule, stop-cleanup reaps. (2) test_AC_04_g_script_evidence — reads .claude/dev-registry/dev-20260524-205206/g-script-evidence.json and validates 3 cases (auth-absent exit nonzero, auth-present + write succeeds exit 0 + flag unlinked, auth-present + write fails exit nonzero + flag STILL unlinked). (3) test_AC_04_g_hook_bash — parametrized 6 cases (g_hook_1/2 subagent touch/redirect, g_hook_5 main-agent NO agent_id MUST be denied per codex finding #7, g_hook_6 unrelated /tmp path NOT blocked, PLUS codex Cycle-5 finding #2 regression cases g_hook_7 python one-liner + g_hook_8 node one-liner — both BLOCKED). (4) test_AC_04_g_hook_write — parametrized 2 cases (g_hook_3 Write to sentinel, g_hook_4 NotebookEdit to flag). Test functions feed mocked JSON payloads to hook stdin via subprocess + assert exit codes.

Split into 2 pytest functions: (1) Phase A — runs write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py with fake SID + CLAUDE_BULK_AUTH_FLAG_PATH_OVERRIDE pointing at a non-existent path, asserts exit non-zero + literal stderr message + no sentinel file written + commit.md Step 7 SKIP-on-BULK-true text still present. (2) Phase B — static portion: verifies commit.md Step 7 dispatch logic exists + SKIP condition includes BULK=true + context.spec_path-based dispatch wired. (Real end-to-end Phase B with changelog-analyst is per AC-05 spec runnable only from full orchestrator context with synthetic dirty repo; the static portion verifies the chain wiring is in place.)

verification_evidence.g_script_harness_path: /tmp/g-script-harness.py (transient — dev-only harness for this cycle's evidence capture)
verification_evidence.score_inject_branches_test: tests/score-inject-contract/test-inject-branches.sh — PASS for populated/missing/malformed with sha256 recomputation verified equal

departures_from_skeletons: AC-04 test split into 4 pytest functions instead of 1 (AC spec called for 2 runtime test families — g.script + g.hook; pytest parametrize used for g.hook bash + write cases).

AC-05 test split into 2 pytest functions (Phase A + Phase B static); Phase B e2e portion requires orchestrator context with synthetic repo and is out-of-scope for pytest fixture (per AC-05 spec — pytest verifies static wiring; real e2e is orchestrator-context test).
Added codex Cycle-5 regression cases g_hook_7 (python one-liner) + g_hook_8 (node one-liner) to test_AC_04_g_hook_bash to lock in the path-mention hook hardening.
